title: Quiz: Programming Models
description: Test understanding of quantum programming paradigms

questions.question: The circuit model operates at which abstraction level?
questions.explanation: Circuit model works with logical gates, above pulses but below applications.

questions.question: Pulse-level programming offers:
questions.explanation: Pulse level gives direct control over physical operations.

questions.question: OpenQASM is a circuit-level representation.
questions.explanation: OpenQASM describes quantum circuits with gates.

questions.question: DRAG pulses are used to:
questions.explanation: DRAG pulses minimize transitions to unwanted energy levels.
